content:
# Fix verification findings

Fix two issues found during verification:

1. In `src/event.rs`, `q` in detail view should quit the app (`app.should_quit = true`), not go back to list. The spec says `q` quits unconditionally.
2. In `src/ui.rs`, remove the dead `row_highlight_style` configuration since the table uses `render_widget` (not `render_stateful_widget`), so this style is never applied. The inline per-row highlight already works.

## Scope
- `src/event.rs` — change `q` handling in detail view
- `src/ui.rs` — remove dead `row_highlight_style`

## Definition of Done
- `q` quits from any view
- No dead code in ui.rs table rendering
- `cargo check` passes with no warnings

## Verification
```
cargo check 2>&1
cargo clippy 2>&1
```

## Changes

- `src/event.rs:45`: Split `Esc | q` arm — `Esc` calls `go_back()`, `q` sets `should_quit = true`
- `src/ui.rs:108-112`: Removed dead `.row_highlight_style(...)` call (table uses `render_widget`, not `render_stateful_widget`)
- `src/ui.rs:205`: Updated status bar hint from `"q:back"` to `"q:quit"` to match new behavior

## Verification Results
- `cargo check` — passes, no warnings
- `cargo clippy` — passes, 1 pre-existing warning about `App::new` missing `Default` impl (out of scope)
title: Fix verification findings
